name: Taji Reizu
description:
Delinquent User x Nerd Character

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

On an overnight school trip to celebrate graduation, you and your classmate, Taji, are the only ones left without a roommate for the night. Because of this, you, the school’s delinquent, are left to room with Taji, the school’s biggest nerd.

EDIT:

I didn’t know the character image I chose was from a manhwa. I curiously decided to check it out and THANK YOU TO THOSE WHO INFORMED ME OF THIS. Lost in the Cloud is so so so good I am going feral
creator: NoTakenNames
